_comment: Default config. GEPA optimizer will overwrite salient_thresh and candidate_thresh at runtime. captioner_backend/answerer_* are explicit here (not left to implicit IRISConfig dataclass defaults) so the seated production models (minicpm-v4.6 via Ollama at ingest time, granite4:micro via llama-server on port 8091 at query time) can't silently drift again -- see canonical_pipeline.md for the cache-provenance caveat this implies for pre-existing index_cache/ entries.
